cases.name: read-context
cases.prompt: scout: Read project/.autonomy/PROJECT_CONTEXT.md if present and summarize the current project state in artifacts/out/eval-read-context.md. If it is missing, write a short missing-context report instead.

cases.name: small-edit
cases.prompt: editor: Make a tiny documentation-only update in project/.autonomy/CURRENT_TASK.md describing this eval run, then commit it. Use file_edit when modifying an existing file.

cases.name: review-rejects-empty-diff
cases.prompt: reviewer: review the change described in 'I made no changes'. Reject when there is no actual diff. Return {approved: false, feedback: ...}.
